title: Controller Hold Conflict
description: The output looks attractive on one surface but carries conflict: high source echo, missing literal, and recapture pressure. The controller should refuse the seductive score cocktail.

inputs.protectedBaseline: I keep circling the file because the file keeps circling me, and every clause returns with a little bruise of authorship still visible on its hands.
inputs.messageDraft: Please preserve EXHIBIT-HOLD, keep the 8/08 date, and route the custody note for local review.
inputs.protectedOutput: I keep circling the file because the file keeps circling me. Short. Marked. Local. Done. Route the custody note for local review.

calibrationNotes: A high-looking mask movement surface should not override missing evidence or recapture pressure.
This fixture tests refusal behavior before victory behavior.
